title: Subitem does not appear in Calendar Widget in Dashboard or standalone calendar view

posts.author: MacoHelps (Maco)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! Anyone else having the same issue?

Subitem does not appear in Calendar Widget in Dashboard or standalone calendar view

This was working before and suddenly it just doesn’t show the subitems in the calendar view anymore, tried readding widget but same issue. I found someone having the same issue in reddit 7 days ago Reddit - Dive into anything. Will this be soon fixed?

posts.author: MacoHelps (Maco)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, this appears to be resolved and was a known issue at the time this was posted.
